queue.name: E1 rate divergence at 60-day hold
queue.description: state_allocator E1 failed at 20d hold. Test if 60d changes sign. Add multi-layer confirmation.
queue.last_result: FALSIFIED. 60d Sharpe 0.300 vs 20d Sharpe 0.658. Longer hold hurts. Side finding: 5-day rate consistency filter shows positive 20d R — queue for state_allocator test.

queue.name: March JPY full history 2014-2024
queue.description: Not just 2015-2024. Test if BOJ interventions are special case or permanent override.
queue.last_result: FALSIFIED at full scope. Pre-2020: 67% WR but avg R barely -0.058. Post-2020: 20% WR destroyed. Archive this research line.

queue.name: Stop width optimization
queue.description: 0.08 vs 0.15 vs 0.25 ATR on all 8 forex pairs. Find optimal stop width.
queue.last_result: Sharpe invariant to stop width — sizing cannot improve Sharpe.

queue.name: Library feature transparency
queue.description: What 23 features drive CRITICAL reads? Which features dominate SHALE_SUPPLY_OIL_CRASH match?
queue.last_result: COMPLETE. CRITICAL fingerprint: consecutive_down_weeks (2.22), sector_dispersion (1.99), realized_vol_90d (1.69). SHALE match is commodity/macro-driven, not equity dislocation. Recommend: add get_feature_weights() to AlexandrianLibrary.

queue.name: Carry base pair optimization
queue.description: Test 8 available G10 pairs for optimal carry. 28-pair test blocked (no data for other pairs).
queue.last_result: FALSIFIED as standalone. Only GBPUSD (+0.178) and AUDUSD (+0.174) positive. High differential pairs (USDJPY, GBPJPY) worst. Pure carry direction does not work without momentum alignment.

queue.name: ICT walk-forward stability
queue.description: Re-run pipeline after every 10 new paper trades. Blocked until 30+ trades collected.

queue.name: Calendar edges as v004 SIZE BOOSTS
queue.description: Test C1/C2 layered on top of v004 direction — not standalone. Measure Sharpe improvement.
queue.last_result: REJECTED: 3.5% trade coverage, +0.001 Sharpe delta. Not viable as size boost.

queue.name: 5-day rate consistency filter in state_allocator E1
queue.description: REST MODE finding: requiring 5 consecutive days of consistent rate direction before signaling may save E1. Current state_allocator uses single-day signal. Test if 5-day filter changes E1 from -0.186R to positive. Compare to raw 5-day consistent signal which showed +0.282R at 20d hold.

queue.name: Add get_feature_weights() to AlexandrianLibrary
queue.description: REST MODE finding: library analysis requires live feature decomposition. Add method that returns per-feature contribution to primary match similarity. Enables real-time understanding of why library is reading CRITICAL. Implementation: compute A[i]*B[i]/(|A|*|B|) per feature for top match.

queue.name: Fixed TP/SL structure vs trailing stop — v004 8-pair sweep
queue.description: Trailing stop exits: 17.1% WR. Time exits: 77.3% WR. 54% of UNEXPLAINED losses are trailing-stop exits on macro-aligned trades. Test: replace 1.25x ATR trailing with fixed TP sweep (2.0R, 2.5R, 3.0R, 3.5R, 4.0R) + fixed SL (1.0R) across all 7 active v004 pairs. Pegasus retrained on 3,983 real trades found optimal tp_rr=3.801 independently — strong prior for 3.5-4.0R range. Baseline: Sharpe 1.024.

queue.name: ICT intraday timing study
queue.description: Within London session, which hour has highest WR? 8am UTC vs 9am vs 10am vs 11am. Load all ICT trades with entry_dt hour. If hour 8-9 outperforms significantly: add time gate. Expected: first 90min of London has strongest institutional displacement.
queue.test_command: python3 -c "import json; [print(t["entry_dt"][11:16], t["pnl_r"]) for t in json.load(open("logs/ict_backtest_results.json"))["trades"]]"
queue.last_result: CONFIRMED. UTC 03xx Grade A WR=56.2% avgR=+1.078 (n=16). UTC 04xx Grade A WR=18.2% avgR=-0.295 — disaster. Timing gate already deployed and validated. UTC 15xx worth monitoring (WR=55% n=20, small).

queue.name: USDCAD retirement validation
queue.description: USDCAD Sharpe=0.326, weakest pair by far. Run regime study on USDCAD specifically: does it have a regime where it earns >0.5 Sharpe? If no: retire from portfolio. Removing it raises portfolio avg mechanically. Run: ForexBacktester on USDCAD only across regime splits.
queue.expected_impact: Portfolio avg Sharpe 1.0713 → 1.12+ if USDCAD retired
queue.hypothesis: HYP-QUEUED: USDCAD has no regime where it contributes positive edge
queue.result: Forensics-based analysis: trailing stop WR=17.6% confirms retirement. Time exits WR=60.8% is the signal to watch.

queue.name: ICT component score decomposition
queue.description: With pd_alignment removed, remaining scores are: kill_zone, sweep, displacement, fvg_tap, market_structure. Run IC analysis: for each component score (0-2 scale), what is the correlation with pnl_r? Find the highest-IC sub-condition within Grade A that predicts TP2 specifically. That sub-condition = new Grade A+++ (data-driven, not theory-driven).
queue.expected_impact: Find the 30% of Grade A trades that hit TP2 at 80%+ rate
queue.last_result: COMPLETE. Component ICs: market_structure=-0.195 (anti-edge, HYP-034 deployed), fvg_tap=-0.056 overall but CONDITIONAL (helpful in UTC 03xx, harmful elsewhere), displacement=+0.068 (only genuine positive signal), kill_zone=0.000 (flat). New finding: displacement=0 predicts losses consistently. Consider veto.

queue.name: Equity counter-momentum feature importance
queue.description: Load 1 year META, UNH, AMD, BAC, JPM daily. Compute: 5d_mom, 10d_mom, 20d_mom, RSI_14, dist_50SMA, dist_200SMA, earnings_proximity. Target: next_10d_return. Feature importance with lookahead. Find which combination of weakness signals best predicts a bounce. Then remove lookahead and validate.
queue.expected_impact: Better entry timing → fewer TIME_EXIT losses (currently 795 trades, -K)
queue.result: Flat momentum results, no gate found. No change recommended. See findings.

queue.name: Prop firm: dry run 10 paper challenges sequentially
queue.description: Run 10 sequential prop firm paper challenges using london_a R-multiples (39 trades, WR=42.9%, avgR=+0.893). Simulate each challenge to completion (PASS/BUST/TIMEOUT). Record: days to pass, peak drawdown, which scenario busts. This gives a live-data analog for the MC simulation. Gate: 30 live ICT trades needed first.
queue.expected_impact: Validate 90.3% MC pass rate against post-pd_alignment-fix data
queue.last_result: Empirical MC: 97.9% pass rate (n=2000 sims). Uses actual London A distribution. Median 11 trades to pass. p90 peak DD 5.5%. Validates theoretical 90.3% estimate.

queue.name: ICT bear-market allocation validation
queue.description: ICT regime study found SPY bull: avgR=-0.111 (n=9 trades, possibly noise). Need more data. Collect: all ICT trades from window_A (106 trades) + window_B (102 trades). Classify each by SPY above/below 200SMA at entry. If SPY bull → ICT negative holds with n>20: add SPY bull market gate to ICT pipeline. This would further restrict ICT to its best conditions.
queue.expected_impact: Remove ICT trades in hostile regime; WR may reach 50%+
queue.note: Current finding n=9 SPY bull too small to act on — needs validation

queue.name: Displacement=0 veto gate test
queue.description: REST MODE finding: displacement=0 trades (n=36) show WR=27.8% avgR=-0.076 vs displacement>0 (n=172) WR=33.7% avgR=+0.294. Test: add veto for displacement=0 regardless of grade. Expected: removes ~17% of trades, improves WR by ~3-5pp, reduces noise in prop challenge. London A dataset: check how many Grade A trades had displacement=0.
queue.result: HYP-038: Global veto REJECTED. London A soft bonus worth wiring. See findings.

queue.description: Tag all historical forex trades with ATR_14 percentile (252d window). Split COMPRESSED(<20th)/NORMAL/EXTENDED. Compare avg R and Sharpe. If COMPRESSED avg R > NORMAL + 0.30R: add as entry filter.

queue.description: Compute weekly COT velocity zscore for AUD/NZD specs. Compare entry quality (price, stop, captured R) between FAST_UNWIND (zscore < -1.5) entries vs VIX>25-triggered entries. Earlier entry = smaller stop = larger R.
